title:
Founding Engineer
Founding Engineer
description:
About the job
We're looking for exceptional software engineers to shape the future of entertainment.

We're one of the fastest-growing startups globally, serving 10 million users in our first 9 months.

About the role
You'll be one of our early engineers, owning core product and infrastructure decisions as we scale to hundreds of millions of users.

Examples of what you will work on
Ship real-time AI video calls from scratch with <200ms latency within 1 week
Orchestrate hundreds of GPUs to serve millions of image generations per day
Test and productionize LoRAs and our in-house models to serve 10-100m users

Stack: TypeScript, Next.js, React, TailwindCSS, tRPC, Postgres, Temporal

We expect you to
Get shit done end-to-end. Understand users → propose idea → implement everything → iterate.
Be hungry to win. This is not going to be easy.
Be exceptional. We only work with the best.

Interview process
A coffee chat, to learn about you and why you'd be a great fit for our team
A technical interview, 1hr of system design, no live coding
A paid work trial, so you get a feel for what it's like to work with us
You get an offer, and we celebrate!
